message:
Fix unqualified skill references in plugin READMEs

Updated git and writing plugin documentation to use fully qualified
skill names, ensuring consistency with skill naming conventions:
- git plugin: git:committer (was committer)
- writing plugin: writing:technical-writing (was technical-writing)

Also bumped versions:
- git: 0.4.2 → 0.4.3
- writing: 0.2.1 → 0.2.2

Generated with Claude Code
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+---
+title: Fix unqualified skill reference in git plugin README
+type: bugfix
+authors:
+- mavam
+- claude
+components:
+- git
+created: 2025-12-11T12:07:33.800274Z
+---
+
+Fix unqualified skill reference in documentation.
+
+The README incorrectly referenced `git:committer` without the plugin namespace. Updated to use the fully qualified name `git:committer` for consistency with skill naming conventions.

@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@

+- writing
+created: 2025-12-11T12:07:35.927857Z
+---
+
+Fix unqualified skill reference in documentation.
+
+The README incorrectly referenced `technical-writing` without the plugin namespace. Updated to use the fully qualified name `writing:technical-writing` for consistency with skill naming conventions.
